    Index

    A B C D E F G H I J K L M N O P R S T U V W X Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    R

    random - Static variable in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Shared random source for selecting bubble-pop variants.
    range - Variable in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Maximum travel distance before auto-removal.
    RangedClass - Class in logic.entity.characterClass
    Base class for ranged characters with ammo and reload mechanics.
    RangedClass() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Creates ranged class with default ranged stats and ammo setup.
    RangedClass(int, int, int, int, float, int) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Creates ranged class with custom combat stats and ammo capacity.
    reload() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Starts reload process if not already reloading.
    reload() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Starts reload when magazine is not full.
    reload() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Reloads and randomizes ammo size between configured min/max bounds.
    reload() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Performs reload and plays Mage-specific reload SFX.
    reload() - Method in interface logic.interfaces.UsesAmmo
    Starts reload behavior.
    RELOAD_DURATION - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Reload duration in nanoseconds.
    reloadDuration - Variable in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Reload duration in nanoseconds.
    reloadKey - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Key binding for manual reload (ammo classes).
    reloadStartTime - Variable in class logic.entity.characterClass.RangedClass
    Timestamp when reload started.
    reloadStartTime - Variable in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Exorcist
    Timestamp when reload began.
    removeProjectile(BaseProjectileAttack) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Removes a projectile from both simulation and scene graph.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.Character
    Resets class-specific buff-modified stats back to origin values.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Restores attack to origin value.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.characterClass.MeleeClass
    Restores defense to pre-buff origin value.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.hybridCharacters.Vampire
    Restores attack and life-steal multiplier to origin values.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Archer
    Restores attack/range to origin values.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Bubble
    Restores attack to origin value.
    resetBuff() - Method in class logic.entity.characters.rangedCharacters.Mage
    Mage heal skill has no additional reset behavior.
    rightKey - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Key binding for moving right.
